calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Appearances: Arnold Evje, II , Esq. represented the Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc.
Defendant, Christopher Pattiz presents in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers.
The parties reached a written stipulation of settlement. Terms of the settlement were NOT read into the record.
Parties signed the stipulation for Entry of Judgment, Document filed.
